_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: ID Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ID Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect remains a broader gap-discovery tier, not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: ID Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after ID/TH Stage B precision guards

_human_review.notes: Project owner manually reviewed the ID Stage B generated/reconciled tests and approved them for internal/project benchmarking. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, procurement-grade legal approval, or recall-lock promotion.
_human_review.scope: ID Stage B candidate labels only; no recall-lock promotion.
